svg.title: Scuro trading bot system overview
svg.desc: Four connected components: xau.py (the trader), advisor.py (the coach), mt5_history.py (the recorder), and the dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the bot connect to MetaTrader5?')
sendPrompt('Explain what xau.py does in detail')
g.text: Asks AI: buy, sell, or skip?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the dual AI consensus work in the bot?')
sendPrompt('Explain what advisor.py does in the Scuro system')
sendPrompt('What does the Scuro dashboard show?')
